title: ClearingChannelTypeValues
description: Specifies the clearing channel for the routing of the transaction, as part of the payment type identification. ISO20022

x-enumeration-literals.name: RealTimeGrossSettlementSystem
x-enumeration-literals.description: Clearing channel is a real-time gross settlement system.

x-enumeration-literals.name: RealTimeNetSettlementSystem
x-enumeration-literals.description: Clearing channel is a real-time net settlement system.

x-enumeration-literals.name: MassPaymentNetSystem
x-enumeration-literals.description: Clearing channel is a mass payment net settlement system.
